hyperedges.label: TLS Passthrough pattern: Proxmox nodes (pve01-pve04) exposed via Gateway passthrough in external namespace
FoundryVTT dual ingress: internal HTTPRoute + external Cloudflare tunnel
FoundryVTT persistent storage stack: PVC backed by nfs-csi-storage mounted in deployment
All production app Flux Kustomizations share gateway dependency + cluster-vars substitution pattern
jellyfin and valheim both use nfs-csi-storage StorageClass with NFS server variable
pihole and whoami HTTPRoutes both attach to internal Gateway using cluster_domain variable substitution
Observability stack: alloy forwards metrics/logs to loki+mimir, grafana visualizes
NFS-dependent apps: jellyfin and valheim both depend on nfs-csi for storage
Gateway dependency chain: crds -> cilium + certs -> gateway; all apps depend on gateway
Authentik SSO OAuth2 integration for Grafana and Synology via blueprints
Core controllers managed together as Flux infra bundle: nfs-csi, cert-manager, grafana-operator
certs Flux Kustomization depends on both cert-manager and cilium before applying
CRDs Bundle: external-snapshotter + gateway-api + grafana-operator-crds + prometheus-crds
Alloy config pipeline: kustomization generates ConfigMap mounted by HelmRelease
Grafana operator pattern: Grafana CR + GrafanaFolders managed via instanceSelector label
Flux Observability Pipeline: ksm CRD metrics -> Mimir -> Grafana alert rules
Grafana Operator dashboard provisioning pattern: GrafanaDashboard CRDs loaded from ConfigMap JSON
Loki SimpleScalable deployment: backend+read+write replicas + minio storage
SNMP Monitoring Pipeline for Synology NAS
Cloudflare DNS-01 Certificate Issuers (prod + staging)
Mimir Distributed with Minio Storage
Cilium L2 LoadBalancer IP advertisement stack
Gateway API TLS termination: internal gateway + wildcard cert + cloudflare issuer
WireGuard VPN deployment: wg-easy pod + NFS PVC + LB service
